entity.summary: Stable-swap automated market maker and decentralized exchange launched on MultiversX in February 2023 and later expanded into routing aggregation and perpetual-trading products under the AshSwap DeFi hub.
entity.notes: The mainnet liquidity launch occurred on 2023-02-17, while swapping opened on 2023-02-18 according to the first-party launch schedule. HEI uses the earlier mainnet launch date for the entity.

events.title: AshSwap launched on MultiversX mainnet
events.description: AshSwap opened its mainnet pools and liquidity functions as a stable-swap decentralized exchange on MultiversX.
events.notes: Trading started the following day; the entity launch date follows the mainnet liquidity launch.

events.title: AshSwap introduced its DEX aggregator
events.description: AshSwap expanded beyond its original stable-swap AMM with a dynamic route aggregator for MultiversX liquidity.
events.notes: Recorded as a material exchange-product expansion rather than a separate entity.

evidence.title: AshSwap Mainnet Launch: The Order of Events
evidence.notes: First-party schedule states that mainnet liquidity would launch on February 17 and trading on February 18.

evidence.title: AshSwap the first stable-swap DEX launches on MultiversX mainnet
evidence.notes: Project-issued release confirms the February 17 mainnet launch plan.

evidence.title: Understand AshSwap
evidence.notes: Current first-party documentation identifies AshSwap as an active stable-swap AMM DEX on MultiversX.

evidence.title: Understand Aggregator
evidence.notes: First-party documentation describes AshSwap's evolution from a stable-swap AMM into a broader DEX aggregation hub.
